summary: Iteration 1 scope: establish test infrastructure (mocktail, bloc_test, network_image_mock), write cubit and widget tests for critical existing features (VehicleCubit, EventsCubit, EventDetailCubit, MaintenancesCubit, garage page, event list page, event detail page), complete the profile page stub (ProfileCubit + GetMyProfileUseCase + initials avatar + main vehicle display), and perform a systematic code review and cleanup across lib/. No new backend endpoints required.
qualityGates: dart analyze passes with zero violations
No hardcoded Spanish strings — all user-visible text in app_es.arb via context.l10n
No raw Material widgets where a shared equivalent exists
No layer violations: domain must not import Flutter; presentation must not call HTTP directly
ProfileCubit registered as @lazySingleton in injection.dart and root MultiBlocProvider
Test directory tree established under test/features/ and integration_test/
assumptions: GET /users/me already returns fullName, email, and id — no backend change needed
profilePhotoUrl is absent from Prisma User model; initials avatar only in v1
ProfileCubit DI scope is @lazySingleton in root MultiBlocProvider
No new freezed state class needed for ProfileCubit — ResultState<UserModel> is sufficient
Integration test stub files created with group blocks even if test bodies are empty
